notes: Fixed: a local source folder on Windows showed 0 songs even when it was full of music. The folder-membership check compared paths with forward slashes, but Windows stores them with backslashes (D:\music\song.mp3), so nothing ever matched — your library still listed the tracks, but clicking the source showed it empty and its count read 0. The check is now separator-agnostic, so Windows source folders list their songs and their counts are correct.
